calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order That Matters In Req. For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Deft Cherry L Staana
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Defendant Cherry L. Staana is denied as moot. It appears from the papers that defendant has complied with the relief requested. Counsel for defendant should prepare a form of order, submit to counsel for plaintiff for approval as to form and submit to court for signature. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
